name: plex-discord-theater
description: A Discord Activity that lets you browse your Plex library and watch movies and TV shows together in a voice channel with synchronized playback.
author: Zuby

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w packages/server" "npm run dev -w packages/client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/client && npm run build -w packages/server
scripts.docker:build: source .env && docker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --build-arg VITE_DISCORD_CLIENT_ID=$DISCORD_CLIENT_ID -t zubywastaken/plex-discord-theater:latest --load .
scripts.deploy: npm run docker:build && npm run docker:push
